description: 10 real-world automation workflows integrating n8n with the Claude API. Ready to use right away.

required_credentials: API keys for services used in each workflow

workflows.name: Automated Email Summary & Reply Draft
workflows.description: Claude summarizes unread Gmail messages and sends reply drafts to Slack

nodes.system_prompt:
You are an email assistant. Analyze each incoming email and provide the following:
1. A 3-line summary
2. Urgency level (High / Medium / Low)
3. Required actions
4. A reply draft (if a reply is needed)

setup_guide: 1. Set up Gmail OAuth2 authentication in n8n
2. Add your Anthropic API key to Credentials
3. Add your Slack Bot Token to Credentials
5. Activate the workflow and verify it works

workflows.name: Internal Q&A Auto-Response Bot
workflows.description: Claude answers questions posted in a specific Slack channel by referencing internal documentation

nodes.system_prompt:
You are an internal IT support expert. Answer questions by referencing the provided internal documentation.

Reference documents:
{{$node['Notion'].json}}

If the answer is not found in the documentation, respond with: "This needs to be verified with the relevant department."

workflows.name: Competitor Monitoring & Reporting
workflows.description: Monitors competitor site updates via RSS; Claude analyzes business impact and logs it to Google Sheets

nodes.system_prompt:
As a competitive intelligence analyst, analyze the following article:

1. Summary (100 words)
2. Impact on our company (1–10)
3. Threat or opportunity
4. Recommended action
5. Urgency

Output in JSON format:
{"summary": "", "impact_score": 0, "type": "", "action": "", "urgency": ""}

workflows.name: Customer Review Analysis & Response
workflows.description: Claude analyzes new reviews, automatically generates draft replies for negative reviews, and logs them in the CRM

nodes.system_prompt:
As a customer success expert, analyze the following:

Review: {{$json.review_text}}
Rating: {{$json.rating}}/5

Output (JSON):
{
  "sentiment": "positive/negative/neutral",
  "main_issue": "Primary issue identified",
  "urgency": "high/medium/low",
  "response_draft": "Draft reply (polite and professional)",
  "escalate": true/false
}

workflows.name: Automated Weekly Report Generation
workflows.description: Collects KPI data from various services; Claude generates a weekly report in PDF format and sends it by email
workflows.use_case: Fully automate weekly report creation (save 2 hours per week)

nodes.system_prompt:
As a data analyst, create a weekly report from the following KPI data.

Data:
GA4: {{$node['Google Analytics'].json}}
Stripe: {{$node['Stripe'].json}}

Report structure:
1. Executive summary (3 lines)
2. Key KPI comparison vs. prior week
3. Notable trends (2 positives and 2 negatives)
4. Action items for next week (prioritized)
5. Concerns (if any)

Output in Markdown format.

workflows.name: Recruitment Application Screening
workflows.description: Claude screens applications against defined criteria and logs results in the ATS (applicant tracking system)

workflows.name: Blog Post Auto-Generation Pipeline
workflows.description: Input a topic and automatically generate an SEO-optimized blog post, then publish it as a draft on WordPress
workflows.trigger: Manual / New row added to Google Sheets

nodes.system_prompt:
As an SEO writer, create the following article.

Topic: {{$json.topic}}
Keywords: {{$json.keywords}}
Target audience: {{$json.audience}}
Word count: {{$json.word_count}} words

Required elements:
1. SEO-optimized title
2. Meta description (120 characters or fewer)
3. Body text (with H2/H3 headings, keywords naturally incorporated)
4. Conclusion
5. Internal link candidates (use [] as placeholders)

Output in Markdown format

workflows.name: Automated Incident Triage
workflows.description: Claude analyzes monitoring alerts and determines severity. Critical incidents trigger a Slack notification and assignee assignment

workflows.name: Deal Notes → CRM Auto-Entry
workflows.description: Sales reps enter deal notes via voice or text; Claude structures them and automatically logs them in Salesforce
workflows.use_case: Reduce CRM data entry effort by 90%

nodes.system_prompt:
As a sales assistant, structure the following deal notes.

Notes: {{$json.text}}

Output (JSON):
{
  "company_name": "",
  "contact_name": "",
  "deal_stage": "prospecting/qualification/proposal/negotiation/closed",
  "deal_amount": 0,
  "next_action": "",
  "next_action_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "pain_points": [],
  "competitors_mentioned": [],
  "summary": "Deal summary",
  "sentiment": "positive/neutral/negative"
}

workflows.name: Multilingual Customer Support
workflows.description: Claude translates, categorizes, and responds to inquiries in any language, then logs them in the CRM in English
workflows.use_case: Deliver multilingual support at zero additional cost

nodes.system_prompt:
Process the following as a multilingual customer support expert.

Inquiry: {{$json.body}}

Step 1: Detect the language
Step 2: Translate to English
Step 3: Classify category (return/technical/billing/other)
Step 4: Write a response in the original language

Output (JSON):
{
  "detected_language": "",
  "english_translation": "",
  "category": "",
  "priority": "high/medium/low",
  "response": "Response in the original language",
  "response_english": "Response in English",
  "requires_human": false
}

step2.title: Configure Your Anthropic API Key
steps: Get your API key at console.anthropic.com
In n8n: Settings → Credentials → Add Credential
Select "Anthropic" and enter your API key

step3.title: Import a Workflow
steps: In n8n, click "+" in the top-right corner → "Import from JSON"

tips: We recommend starting with wf-001 (email summarization)
Verify behavior in test mode before going to production
Check the n8n Execution log when errors occur
Choose the Claude model that balances quality and cost (Sonnet recommended)
